title: scrophularia elbursensis
intro: Scrophularia elbursensis, also known as Elburz figwort, is a flowering plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae), native to Iran. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its chemical constituents such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Scrophularia elbursensis are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Scrophularia elbursensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
